sglang.title: [codex] Add official diffusion GT workflow mode
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add an opt-in official diffusion GT mode to diffusion-ci-gt-gen.yml.

Adds run_official_cases with default false; native SGLang GT generation remains the default path.
Adds official_source_group and official_case_ids inputs for targeted official GT regeneration.
Computes a per-case official

sglang.title: [codex] Optimize LTX2.3 HQ denoising split passes
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Optimize LTX2.3 HQ guided denoising by passing disable-attention options directly to the model when each forward contains only one expanded-batch item.
Avoid an internal CUDA bool sync in the res2s SDE terminal path.
Keep TI2V/non-HQ on perturbation_configs, which stores one disable-attenti

sglang.title: [pd]: (Bug Fix) Incorrect out_cache_loc slicing in prepare_for_prebuilt
sglang.author: hzh0425

sglang.title: [NPU] Fix Z-Image negative-branch rotary embeddings for CFG
sglang.author: gxxx-hum
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix Z-Image negative prompt rotary embeddings.

Modifications
Use batch.negative_prompt_embeds[0] when preparing negative-condition freqs_cis.

Deploy
nohup sglang serve \
--model-path /Z-Image \
--port 8080 \
--log-level debug \
--host 0.0.0.0 > sglang.log 2>&1 &

Accuracy Tests
Using 0.

sglang.title: [UnifiedRadixTree]: Support HiCache Framework for UnifiedRadixTree
sglang.author: hzh0425
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This branch adds HiCache support to UnifiedRadixTree and unifies the device/host cache lifecycle across Full, Mamba, and related hybrid components.
In particular, it enables HiCache on top of the unified tree for Hybrid Linear models and DeepSeek DSA-style models, with componentized evict

sglang.title: [diffusion] CI: switch CI data references to sgl-project/ci-data
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

point diffusion comparison publishing/history reads at sgl-project/ci-data
point generic trace publishing at sgl-project/ci-data
remove the old sglang-bot/sglang-ci-data consistency-GT fallback now that the needed data has been migrated
prune stale diffusion case-id references and derive co

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Add Qwen Image ModelOpt FP8 support
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add ModelOpt FP8 support for Qwen Image diffusion transformers in the SGLang runtime and FP8 converter.

make Qwen Image attention, MLP, and top-level projections quant-aware with full checkpoint prefixes
add a Qwen Image / Qwen Image Edit BF16 fallback profile, including transformer_blocks.

sglang.title: [diffusion] Add dynamic batching v0
sglang.author: qimcis
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#18594
Modifications
Added dynamic batching (with max batch size + delay) to the diffusion scheduler. Across the tested text-to-image models, dynamic batching gave up to +29.6% higher throughput, -22.4% lower mean latency, and -31.8% lower P99 latency.
Currently does not support i2i/edits

sglang.title: [PD]: Support incremental transfer for mooncake transfer engine
sglang.author: hzh0425
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Implemented Mooncake decode-radix transfer support:

Propagate decode_prefix_len through Mooncake metadata.
Store it on prefill-side TransferInfo as Optional[int].
Skip empty KV transfer for full prefix hits while still sending aux/state on the last chunk.
Added Mooncake unit coverage and

sglang.title: extract mega-moe to layers/moe/mega_moe.py
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Per #23882 (comment) — moves the mega-moe symm buffer cache, dispatch (should_use_mega_moe / forward_mega_moe / _run_mega_routed) and build_mega_moe_experts_weights out of models/deepseek_v2.py + models/deepseek_v4.py into layers/moe/mega_moe.py.

sglang.title: rerun-test: route deepep h200 suite to deepep runner
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Match the runner that pr-test.yml uses for stage-c-test-deepep-8-gpu-h200 (8-gpu-h200-deepep), so /rerun-test on this suite lands on the same hardware as the original PR job.

sglang.title: Register deepseek_v32 alias instead of rewriting config.json
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Replaces the temp-folder hack that rewrote config.json with a registry-time alias, so AutoConfig / AutoTokenizer dispatch works natively.

sglang.title: extract dsv4 server-args hooks to arg_groups
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Move DSv4-specific defaults + CP validation out of server_args.py into arg_groups/deepseek_v4_hook.py. No behavioral change.
Aligned with RFC #20481 (per-arch hook + lazy import), but simplified — flat arg_groups/<model>_hook.py instead of the RFC's nested arg_groups/handlers/model_specific/<model>.

sglang.title: introduce arg_groups/ with nemotron_h hook
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Seed the per-arch hook framework called out in RFC #20481, with a minimal example: extract the `NemotronHForCausalLM` model-specific block out of `server_args.py` into `arg_groups/nemotron_h_hook.py`.
This is a flat, simplified version of the RFC structure — `arg_groups/_hook.py` instead of nested `

sglang.title: [diffusion] chore: disable VAE cpu offload by default
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Keep vae_cpu_offload disabled by default, including low-memory and video-generation auto-offload defaults.
Preserve explicit --vae-cpu-offload as the opt-in memory-saving path.
Order mem-analysis offload-disable suggestions by recommendation priority instead of alphabetical order: VAE, imag

sglang.title: (1/n - prefill optimize)feat(lora): enable csgmv backend with virtual experts for MoE LoRA
sglang.author: yushengsu-thu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Remove the assertion that restricted --lora-use-virtual-experts to triton-only. The virtual experts path uses its own triton kernel (merged_experts_fused_moe_lora_add) independent of the dense-LoRA backend, so csgmv is fully compatible.
Fix CUDA graph crash when using --lora-backend csgmv -

sglang.title: extract adjust_hybrid_swa_layers_for_pp
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Pure refactor: extract the inline hybrid-SWA + PP layer-id adjustment in initialize() into adjust_hybrid_swa_layers_for_pp(), gate it with an is_hybrid_swa early-return, and move the call site before the loop_num block. No behavior change — the consumers of model_config.{swa,full}_attention_layer_id

Following PRs have large set of conflict, we use this PR and upstream amd/deepseek_v4 branch to integrate in parallel.

sglang.title: dedup state_kv_args setup into helper
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Extracts the duplicated state_type / state buffer setup block from disaggregation/prefill.py and disaggregation/decode.py into a shared setup_state_kv_args helper in disaggregation/utils.py. Pure refactor, no behavior change.

sglang.title: revert rocm artifacts from dsv4-rebase (cuda-only scope)
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Revert ROCm-only hunks to keep PR #23882 CUDA-only. See individual commits.

sglang.title: nextn subclass owns post_load_weights is_nextn
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Refactor: NextN subclasses (BailingMoeForCausalLMNextN, DeepseekV3ForCausalLMNextN) now own the is_nextn=True argument when calling their underlying post_load_weights, instead of relying on the loader to pass it based on architecture-name string match. Aligns with the existing pattern in longcat_fla

sglang.title: chore(codeowners): add @kpham-sgl as codeowner for ngram files
sglang.author: kpham-sgl
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add @kpham-sgl as a codeowner for ngram-related files across python/sglang/srt/speculative, python/sglang/jit_kernel, sgl-kernel, and ngram tests under test/registered.
Follows the existing gemma4 ownership pattern: preserves all current directory-level owners and appends @kpham-sgl.

Test

vllm.title: [Doc] Add Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking-2507-FP8 to batch invariance verified models
vllm.author: taneem-ibrahim
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking-2507-FP8 to the list of batch invariance verified models under the Qwen3 (MoE) section in docs/features/batch_invariance.md

Test plan

 Verified the model passes batch invariance tests and mypy tests
 Documentation-only change, no code impact

vllm.title: Disable flashinfer autotune temporarily due to correctness issues
vllm.author: wzhao18
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
We have observed correctness bugs with flashinfer autotuning, as seen in issue flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#3197. Kernel-level reproduction is available.
While this is pending for fix, this PR disables flashinfer autotuning by default for now for O1 and O2 optimization levels.
Test Plan
Test Res

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Ray] Fix RayExecutorV2 actor name collision with DP > 1
vllm.author: tomeras91
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

RayExecutorV2 names its TP worker actors as vllm_Worker_{instance_id}[_TP{n}] (see vllm/v1/executor/ray_utils.py::build_actor_name). When data_parallel_size > 1, CoreEngineActorManager.__init__ produces each DP engine's VllmConfig via copy.deepcopy(vllm_config), which preserves the original

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix FP8 Bias Loading
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes the underlying cause of #41284
The issue is that when layers have bias=True, we do the following:

Initialize the weights on meta device + wrap its own weight loader, allocate the bias (not on meta device)
The params are generally yielded alphabetically when we are loading them. This m

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix degenerate KV cache stride causing TMA cudaErrorIllegalInstruction
vllm.author: the-david-oy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix cudaErrorIllegalInstruction → NCCL allgather hang → EngineDeadError that occurs when num_kv_heads_per_rank == 1 (e.g. Qwen3.5-397B with --tensor-parallel-size 8) and prefix caching is enabled.
Root cause: When prefix-cached KV blocks are freed and reallocated, PyTorch can produce tensor

vllm.title: [Bench] Forward --seed to CustomDataset and CustomMMDataset shuffle
vllm.author: Aktsvigun
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
get_samples in vllm/benchmarks/datasets/datasets.py passes random_seed=args.seed to RandomDataset and every HuggingFace-family dataset branch, but omits it when instantiating CustomDataset and CustomMMDataset. Both classes run random.seed(self.random_seed) followed by random.shuffle(self.dat

vllm.title: [CI] Clean up remote servers on pytest parent exit
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The motivation was these test groups:

mi355_2: LM Eval Qwen3-5 Models (B200-MI355)
mi355_2: Weight Loading Multiple GPU

This PR introduces:

Tracking live RemoteVLLMServer instances and cleaning them up on atexit, SIGTERM, and SIGINT.
Preventing detached vllm serve process groups from surviving an

vllm.title: [Transformers v5] Vendor HCXVisionConfig for compatibility
vllm.author: HanFa
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Vendor the HyperCLOVAX Vision config into vLLM to fix transformers v5 compatibility.
The upstream remote code config does not handle empty initialization (text_config=None), which breaks transformers v5's @strict config validation (huggingface/transformers#41250).
Root cause: HCXVisionConfig

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Align spec decode logprob test prefill settings
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a ROCm-only failure in test_spec_decode_logprobs for the ngram speculative decoding cases. The test compares logprobs from a regular base-model run against logprobs from a speculative decoding run. For that comparison to isolate speculative decoding, both LLM instances need to use the

vllm.title: [CI] Stabilize cpu offload compressed tensors test
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Avoid flaky stochastic sampling in the compressed-tensors MoE CPU offload test.
Changes

Added an opt-out for seeded sampling checks in compare_two_settings.
Disabled only the temperature=1 seeded sampling portion for the w4a16 compressed-tensors MoE offload test.
Kept deterministic coverage for gre
